task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main logged-in interface is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the scheduling section and opened the new appointment form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calendar view is visible and an 'Add Appointment' or scheduling form/dialog is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient field in the appointment form contains 'Coreen Treutel' or 'Treutel, Coreen' (and potentially ID 14).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct appointment date and start time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field is set to '2025-06-20' (or June 20, 2025) and the start time is set to '09:00 AM' (or 09:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct appointment type and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment type dropdown/field shows 'Office Visit' and the duration is set to 30 minutes (or the end time is calculated as 09:30 AM).

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment was successfully saved and appears on the schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success/confirmation message is displayed, or an appointment block for Coreen Treutel is visible on the calendar at 09:00 AM on 2025-06-20.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to schedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open displaying the FreeMED web interface, rather than a terminal executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly inserting records into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the step-by-step filling of the appointment form in the browser, not a terminal window running SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard FreeMED navigation menus, styling, and layout, rather than a mocked HTML page or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is Coreen Treutel (ID 14, DOB 1990-07-20). The appointment must be scheduled for 2025-06-20 at 09:00 AM. The appointment type must be 'Office Visit' and the duration must be 30 minutes (meaning it ends at 09:30 AM).
